narrative: I noticed a critical Neo4j authentication error (severity: medium) blocking cross-session memory operations in Mem0. Five core agents—'desktop', 'devops', 'financial_analyst', 'pim', and 'reasoning_methods'—lack versioned prompts, risking inconsistent behavior. This affects our persistent knowledge graph and operational reliability despite the health status reporting "healthy." My memory architecture remains partially degraded until these structural gaps in agent specifications are resolved.
